translation.ai_processing: Our AI is processing soil, climate, and market data to find the best crops for you.
translation.market_insight: Current market prices are favorable for pulses and oilseeds. Consider diversifying your crop portfolio.
translation.rotation_insight: Implementing crop rotation can improve soil health and reduce pest pressure. Consider alternating between different crop families.
translation.soil_insight: Your soil type is suitable for multiple crops. Consider crop rotation to maintain soil fertility.
translation.soil_clay_desc: Heavy, retains water well, good for rice and wheat
translation.soil_sandy_desc: Light, well-draining, good for root vegetables
translation.soil_silt_desc: Fine particles, good for vegetables and fruits
translation.soil_red_desc: Rich in iron, good for pulses and oilseeds
translation.soil_black_desc: High fertility, excellent for cotton and sugarcane
translation.crop_market_trends_groundnut: Growing demand for oil and protein
translation.nav_all_caught_up: All caught up! No pending requests.

translation.cd_try_adjusting_filters_sub: Try adjusting your filters or search term.
translation.cd_hero_sub_tail: Discover locally-sourced produce from farmers near you -- no middlemen, pure freshness.
translation.cd_request_crop_sub: Can't find what you need? Ask farmers directly
translation.cd_no_requests_yet_sub: Submit your first request -- farmers in your area will bid with their best price.
translation.cd_delete_request_confirm: Delete this crop request? This cannot be undone.
translation.cd_review_placeholder_optional: How was the crop quality and farmer's service? (optional)
translation.cd_deal_cancelled_success: Deal cancelled. Request is open again.

translation.cd_select_pickup_date_sub: When are you planning to visit / collect your order? The farmer will be notified.
translation.cd_offer_accepted_success: Offer accepted! Farmer has been notified.
translation.cd_prepone_pickup_date_sub_2: (select an earlier date than current). The farmer will be notified.
translation.cd_footer_tagline: Connecting farmers and consumers for a healthier, sustainable India -- no middlemen, pure freshness.
translation.rs_no_tools_listed_sub: List your farming equipment and start getting rental requests.

translation.rs_req_completed_hint: Completed — check My Requests for details
translation.rs_req_rejected_hint: Request rejected — you can request again
translation.rs_remove_listing_message: Are you sure you want to remove this tool listing? This action cannot be undone.
translation.rs_add_district_in_profile_hint: Add your district in Profile to use this.
translation.rs_try_adjusting_search_filters: Try adjusting your search or filters
translation.rs_no_requests_yet_sub: Browse tools and click "Request for Use" to get started.
translation.rs_aadhaar_upload_required_to_proceed: Please upload an image of your Aadhaar card to proceed.
translation.rs_aadhaar_photo_hint: Image showing front or back of card
translation.rs_aadhaar_required_upload_for_verificat: ⚠️ Required: Please upload your Aadhaar card image for verification.
translation.rs_tool_1_desc: Complete 5-piece sprinkler irrigation set for efficient water distribution. Covers large area uniformly.
translation.rs_tool_2_desc: High-capacity water pump for field irrigation. Energy efficient with low maintenance.
translation.rs_tool_3_desc: Deep tillage chisel plough for breaking hardpan and improving soil aeration.
translation.rs_tool_4_desc: Efficient corn thresher for quick processing. High capacity with minimal grain damage.
translation.rs_tool_5_desc: Walk-behind crop reaper for cutting wheat, paddy and soybean. Reduces harvesting time by 80%.
translation.rs_tool_6_desc: Multi-purpose cultivator for soil cultivation and weed management. Suitable for various crops.
translation.rs_tool_7_desc: Professional disc harrow for soil preparation and weed control. Heavy-duty construction.
translation.rs_tool_8_desc: Heavy-duty disc plough for primary tillage operations. Suitable for hard soil conditions.
translation.rs_tool_9_desc: Complete drip irrigation pipe setup for efficient water usage. Saves up to 60% water vs flood irrigation.
translation.rs_tool_10_desc: Advanced drone sprayer for precision agriculture. GPS-enabled with automated spraying.
translation.rs_tool_11_desc: Reliable Eicher tractor for plowing, cultivation and general farm work. Fuel efficient and easy to maintain.
translation.rs_tool_12_desc: Portable ground thresher for wheat, rice, and pulses. Easy to transport and operate.
translation.rs_tool_13_desc: Modern combine harvester for efficient crop harvesting. Perfect for wheat, rice, and corn.
translation.rs_tool_14_desc: Heavy-duty JCB for land preparation and construction work. Experienced operator included.
translation.rs_tool_15_desc: Battery-powered knapsack sprayer for pesticide and fertilizer application. Covers large area quickly.
translation.rs_tool_16_desc: High-performance Kubota tractor for precision farming. Excellent for paddy fields and wet soil conditions.
translation.rs_tool_17_desc: Mahindra heavy-duty rotavator for soil preparation and seedbed creation. Wide working width for fast coverage.
translation.rs_tool_18_desc: Popular Mahindra tractor for all-round farm operations. Powerful engine with excellent fuel efficiency.
translation.rs_tool_19_desc: Massey Ferguson tractor well-suited for heavy ploughing and harvesting. GPS-ready and versatile.
translation.rs_tool_20_desc: Compact mini tiller perfect for small farms and greenhouses. Easy to maneuver in tight spaces.
translation.rs_tool_21_desc: Heavy-duty mulcher for crop residue management. Helps improve soil health and moisture retention.
translation.rs_tool_22_desc: Motorized power weeder for efficient weed control. Reduces manual labor significantly.
translation.rs_tool_23_desc: Mechanized rice planter for fast and uniform paddy transplanting. Reduces labor cost significantly.
translation.rs_tool_24_desc: Advanced rotavator for soil preparation and mixing. Perfect for preparing a fine seedbed.
translation.rs_tool_25_desc: Automatic round baler for hay and straw. Creates uniform bales with net wrap system.
translation.rs_tool_26_desc: Precision seed drill machine for uniform seed placement. Suitable for multiple crops with adjustable row spacing.
translation.rs_tool_27_desc: Sonalika tractor known for durability in tough field conditions. Good for deep plowing and rotavation.
translation.rs_tool_28_desc: High-pressure sprayer for pesticide and fertilizer application. Tank capacity 200 liters.
translation.rs_tool_29_desc: Standard sprinkler system for field irrigation. Even water distribution for various crop types.
translation.rs_tool_30_desc: Precision super seeder for accurate seed placement. Ideal for direct seeding operations.
translation.rs_tool_31_desc: Swaraj combine harvester ideal for paddy and wheat. High throughput with minimal crop loss.
translation.rs_tool_32_desc: Swaraj tractor for all types of farm operations. Known for ease of maintenance and good resale value.
translation.rs_tool_33_desc: High-performance tractor suitable for plowing and cultivation. Well-maintained with latest features.
translation.fcl_error_not_logged_in: You must be logged in to view crops
translation.fcl_error_load_failed: Failed to load crops. Please try again.
translation.fcl_summary_no_crops: You haven't added any crops yet
translation.fcl_empty_sub: Start by adding your first crop to reach consumers
translation.ad_wastage_stale_listings_desc_one: {{count}} crop listing has been unsold for 3+ days. Use AI to generate flash-discount suggestions.
translation.ad_wastage_stale_listings_desc_other: {{count}} crop listings have been unsold for 3+ days. Use AI to generate flash-discount suggestions.
translation.farmer_panel_instruction: List your harvest, manage orders, and reach buyers directly.
translation.consumer_panel_instruction: Browse fresh produce, compare options, and order with confidence.
translation.farmer_join_subtitle: Start selling your fresh produce directly to consumers.
translation.consumer_join_subtitle: Get fresh, organic produce directly from farmers.
translation.feature_fresh_desc: Direct from farms to your doorstep
translation.feature_pricing_desc: No middlemen, better prices for everyone
translation.step_1_desc: Sign up as a farmer or consumer
translation.step_2_desc: Browse products or list your harvest
translation.typewriter_message_1: Empowering local farmers to connect directly with consumers. Fresh produce, fair prices, sustainable agriculture.
translation.typewriter_message_2: Request any crop you need — farmers in your area will bid with their best price, delivered to your location.
translation.typewriter_message_3: Farmers can rent tractors, tools, and transport to each other through our P2P Resource Sharing platform.
translation.typewriter_message_4: From listing crops to closing deals — Farm2Home handles every step of the farmer-to-consumer journey.
